'''Station TFP-9''' was an ovoid-shaped [[Space station/Legends|space station]] owned by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. 
==Description==
It had a series of docking arrays and two refueling ports at its ends.

It was equipped with [[deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]]. Two stock [[YT-1250 freighter]]s provided some defense.
==History==
It was located in the sixth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position of the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]], and was the outpost for the Federation in that system. 

While its 
It was the first installation to be [[Battle at TFP-9|attacked]] by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sorran]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] fleet during their attempt to steal several [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighters]]. During the battle with [[Echo Flight]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Dren Melne]] revealed that his loyalties were with Sorran's employer by shooting down a number of Echo Flight pilots in an attempt to force [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]] to surrender.

==Appearances==
